creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #1)

I just recompiled my 11.1 kernel without INET6 and nmap 7.40 works fine.
However I have no 10.x box anymore to try this on.

As far as I'm concerned, we can close this (unless someone wants to try 10.4).

Thanks for the attention.
